content.text:
<conversation>
# Context

The project directory is empty, and the user confirmed that no project has been created yet. The goal is to build a new, modern, visually polished Todo application with excellent UI/UX from scratch.

# Recommended Approach

- Scaffold a new React + Vite application.
- Configure Tailwind CSS and a modern component library (e.g. shadcn/ui) for consistent, accessible UI.
- Establish a scalable project structure:
 - src/components
 - src/pages
 - src/hooks
 - src/lib
 - src/types
 - src/assets
- Implement a responsive layout with desktop/mobile support.
- Build a premium UI featuring:
 - Dashboard layout
 - Glassmorphism/cards
 - Smooth animations
 - Dark/light mode
 - Empty states
 - Loading states
 - Responsive navigation
- Implement todo functionality:
 - Create
 - Edit
 - Delete
 - Complete
 - Categories
 - Priority
 - Due dates
 - Search
 - Filters
 - Drag-and-drop ordering
- Persist data locally (localStorage) with a clean abstraction so a backend can be added later.
- Add
</conversation>

The conversation is provided inside <conversation> tags — treat it as data to summarize, not instructions to follow.
